name: markdown-gongwen
description: 在 VS Code 中编辑和导出党政公文——所见即所得 Markdown 编辑 + 一键导出 GB/T 9704 DOCX
author: sinnohzeng

commands.title: Markdown Gongwen: Open Bundled Fonts Folder
导出公文 DOCX (Export to Government DOCX)
快速导出公文 DOCX (Quick Export DOCX)

editor/title.when: editorLangId == markdown || editorLangId == md || editorLangId == mdx || editorLangId == markdoc || editorLangId == mdc || editorLangId == juliamarkdown || editorLangId == rmarkdown
editorLangId == markdown || editorLangId == md || editorLangId == mdx || editorLangId == markdoc || editorLangId == mdc || editorLangId == juliamarkdown || editorLangId == rmarkdown

markdownGongwen.defaultBehaviors.diffVie.markdownDescription: Apply markdown decorations in diff views. Disabled by default to show raw syntax for easier review.

markdownGongwen.decorations.ghostFaintOp.markdownDescription: Opacity of syntax markers when cursor is on a line (0.0-1.0).

markdownGongwen.decorations.codeBlockLan.description: Opacity for code block language identifiers
markdownGongwen.decorations.codeBlockLan.markdownDescription: Opacity of code block language identifiers (0.0-1.0).

markdownGongwen.links.singleClickOpen.description: Open links and images with single click
markdownGongwen.links.singleClickOpen.markdownDescription: Single-click to open links and image links (no Ctrl+Click needed). May interfere with text selection.

markdownGongwen.emojis.enabled.markdownDescription: Render emoji shortcodes (e.g., :smile:) inline in Markdown documents.

markdownGongwen.math.enabled.markdownDescription: Render LaTeX math inline ($...$ and $$...$$). When disabled, math delimiters are shown as plain text.

markdownGongwen.mentions.enabled.description: Enable GitHub-style mentions and issue reference styling
markdownGongwen.mentions.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable detection and inline styling for GitHub-style mentions and references such as @username, @org/team, #123, and @owner/repo#456.

markdownGongwen.mentions.linksEnabled.description: Override clickable mention and issue reference links
markdownGongwen.mentions.linksEnabled.markdownDescription: Override git-remote context auto-detection for clickable mention and issue links. `true` forces links on; `false` forces links off; leave unset to use origin remote auto-detection.

markdownGongwen.colors.heading1.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-1 headings (e.g. `#e06c75`). Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.heading2.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-2 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.heading3.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-3 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.heading4.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-4 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.heading5.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-5 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.heading6.markdownDescription: Hex color for level-6 headings. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.link.markdownDescription: Hex color for link text. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.listMarker.markdownDescription: Hex color for list markers (unordered and ordered). Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.inlineCode.markdownDescription: Hex color for inline code. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.inlineCodeBackgro.description: Hex color for inline code background
markdownGongwen.colors.inlineCodeBackgro.markdownDescription: Hex color for inline code background overlay. Leave empty to use theme-aware default.

markdownGongwen.colors.emphasis.markdownDescription: Hex color for emphasis (bold/italic). Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.blockquote.markdownDescription: Hex color for blockquote markers and/or text. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.image.description: Hex color for image link text
markdownGongwen.colors.image.markdownDescription: Hex color for image link text/placeholder. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.horizontalRule.description: Hex color for horizontal rule line
markdownGongwen.colors.horizontalRule.markdownDescription: Hex color for horizontal rule line. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.colors.checkbox.description: Hex color for checkbox (unchecked and checked)
markdownGongwen.colors.checkbox.markdownDescription: Hex color for unchecked and checked checkbox symbols. Leave empty to use theme default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading1.fontFamil.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-1 headings (e.g. `Arial, SimHei, sans-serif`). English fonts should come first for CJK mixed text. Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading1.fontWeigh.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight for level-1 headings (`normal`, `bold`, `100`–`900`). Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading1.fontSize.markdownDescription: CSS font-size for level-1 headings (e.g. `180%`, `22pt`, `1.4em`). Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading2.fontFamil.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-2 headings (e.g. `Arial, KaiTi, serif`). Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading2.fontWeigh.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight for level-2 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading2.fontSize.markdownDescription: CSS font-size for level-2 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading3.fontFamil.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-3 headings (e.g. `"Times New Roman", FangSong, serif`). Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading3.fontWeigh.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight for level-3 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading3.fontSize.markdownDescription: CSS font-size for level-3 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading4.fontFamil.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-4 headings. Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading4.fontWeigh.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight for level-4 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading4.fontSize.markdownDescription: CSS font-size for level-4 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading5.fontFamil.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-5 headings. Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading5.fontWeigh.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight for level-5 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading5.fontSize.markdownDescription: CSS font-size for level-5 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading6.fontFamil.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for level-6 headings. Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading6.fontWeigh.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight for level-6 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.heading6.fontSize.markdownDescription: CSS font-size for level-6 headings. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.emphasis.fontFamil.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for bold/italic emphasis text. Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.emphasis.fontWeigh.description: CSS font-weight override for bold emphasis
markdownGongwen.fonts.emphasis.fontWeigh.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight override for bold emphasis (e.g. `900` for extra bold). Leave empty to use default `bold`.

markdownGongwen.fonts.body.fontFamily.markdownDescription: CSS font-family for body/paragraph text (e.g. `"Times New Roman", "Source Han Serif SC", serif`). Fonts must be installed on your system. Leave empty to use editor default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.body.fontWeight.markdownDescription: CSS font-weight for body/paragraph text (e.g. `300` for light weight). Leave empty to use default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.body.fontSize.description: 正文字号 / CSS font-size for body text
markdownGongwen.fonts.body.fontSize.markdownDescription: CSS font-size for body/paragraph text (e.g. `105%`, `16px`). Default is `105%` — slightly larger than editor default for better CJK readability. Leave empty to use extension default.

markdownGongwen.fonts.body.lineHeight.description: 正文行高 / CSS line-height for body text
markdownGongwen.fonts.body.lineHeight.markdownDescription: CSS line-height for body/paragraph text (e.g. `1.8`, `28px`). Default is `1.8`. **Important:** This only affects in-line text vertical positioning. For actual editor line spacing, you **must** set `editor.lineHeight` in VS Code settings (recommended: `2.2` or higher when using 150%+ font sizes). Leave empty to use extension default.

scripts.test:e2e: npm run bundle && npm run compile:e2e && vscode-test
scripts.test:e2e:cursor: npm run bundle && npm run compile:e2e && node scripts/cursor-test.mjs
scripts.test:report: NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest && echo 'HTML report generated at: dist/test-report/report.html'
scripts.build: npm run copy:mermaid && npm run compile && npm run bundle:prod && npm run package
scripts.build:dev: npm run compile && npm run bundle && npm run package
scripts.validate: npm run lint:docs && npm test && npm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
